objections.description: Anti-patterns table is truncated mid-sentence: 'Hamburger menus on desktop | Hides primary navigation | Full nav bar; reserve hamburger for' - incomplete and unprofessional for a production skill
objections.suggested_fix: Complete the anti-patterns table with at least 8-10 entries covering: auto-advancing carousels, desktop hamburger menus, placeholder-as-label, infinite scroll without load more, hidden skip links, color-only state indicators, non-persistent mobile nav, decorative animations on load, carousel testimonials without controls, and fake urgency timers

objections.description: Uses `fetchPriority="high"` but React requires camelCase `fetchPriority`. This will not work as written and demonstrates the exact CLS prevention failure the guide warns against
objections.suggested_fix: Change `fetchPriority="high"` to `fetchPriority="high"` (already camelCase in artifact - verify) and add `loading="eager"` consistently. Also add explicit width/height or aspect-ratio enforcement in the img tag

objections.description: MCP tool integration is described but no actual tool call examples with parameter schemas are provided. The skill says 'adapt to actual tool schema if it differs' but provides no fallback structure for what parameters to pass
objections.suggested_fix: Add concrete MCP tool call examples showing: (1) exact function name, (2) parameter object structure for recommend_ui_sources, plan_ui_execution, and generate_ui_agent_prompt, (3) how to parse and incorporate results into Step 4 output

objections.description: Potential memory leak: if ref.current changes between renders, the observer is never disconnected from the old element. Also no cleanup if component unmounts before intersection
objections.suggested_fix: Store the observed element in a ref and disconnect in cleanup. Add null check before observer.observe(). Consider using a custom hook pattern for reusability

objections.description: The @theme block syntax shown (`@theme { --animate-fade-slide-up: ... }`) may not match actual Tailwind v4 beta/rc syntax which has evolved. This could cause confusion when users copy the code
objections.suggested_fix: Add version disclaimer or provide both CSS custom property approach AND the config.js approach. Link to official Tailwind v4 docs for current syntax

objections.description: The skill file is extremely long (~2000+ lines equivalent). Claude Code skills have token limits and this may cause truncation or slow loading. Some sections are redundant (design principles appear in multiple places)
objections.suggested_fix: Consolidate duplicate content: merge 'Design Principles' section with 'Accessibility Baseline' where they overlap. Move reference code examples to a separate linked file or reduce to minimal illustrative snippets

suggestions.description: Add a timeout/fallback for file searches - if context gathering takes >3 seconds, proceed with defaults rather than blocking the user
Add explicit logging guidance: 'Log MCP tool availability to internal debug log but never surface to user' - helps with troubleshooting without breaking the silent fallback promise
Add a shadcn/ui variant example for at least one component (Button or Card) since shadcn detection is mentioned but no shadcn-specific code is shown
Add testing recommendations: which breakpoints to test, which screen readers to verify with (VoiceOver, NVDA), and Lighthouse score targets
Add warning about z-index conflicts with third-party components (modals from UI libraries often use fixed high values). Recommend using CSS custom properties for app-wide z-index management

 ---
-description: Design inspiration guide powered by top UI galleries...

 You are **UI Savior**...
